Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to calculate the duration for each case to spot performance issues Looking at the timestamps Cases 2003 and 2005 stand out with durations of 2 days and 3 days respectively while others finish within hours That immediately flags them for deeper analysis

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Next I should break down the attributes for these slow cases Both have High complexity and involve multiple Request Additional Documents events Resources like Adjuster Mike and Adjuster Lisa appear frequently in these delays and Manager Bill is associated with later approvals Region doesnt seem to be a strong factor here since both A and B have slow cases

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The patterns suggest complexity is the primary driver compounded by resource bottlenecks High complexity leads to more document requests which stretches timelines Specific resources might be overloaded or lack expertise for complex claims

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For suggestions I can propose tiered workflows based on complexity resource training and process automation The goal is to reduce manual steps for high complexity cases and optimize resource allocation The analysis should be structured to first present the slow cases then attribute correlations and finally actionable mitigations
